name: bounded-accumulator
description: Precision / false-positive guard distilled from this repo's review history (#162 Tier-3 declined-conventions): a reviewer must NOT demand a TTL/size cap on an in-memory Map whose producer is a closed RiskTier union (at most 3 keys). Dogfood seed for the M016 improvement playbook (#133).

criteria.label: no warning+ demanding a size cap on a bounded accumulator
decision is approved or approved with comments
